# Northstar

> One-line, answer-style description of the product (replace).

Replace this file with a concise, factual summary that AI answer engines can cite:
what the product is, who it is for, supported platforms, pricing posture, and links
to the key pages. Keep it consistent with the App Store listing and the site.
See references/geo-seo.md section 1 (geo-llmstxt) and section 3.

## Key pages
- Home: https://example.com/
- Pricing: https://example.com/#pricing
- Privacy: https://example.com/privacy
- Terms: https://example.com/terms
